component.name: consumer_complete
component.description: Complete the current message in an ASB event integration flow. Declares the message processing to be successful. Event Integration-only.

component.name: consumer_abandon
component.description: Abandon the current message in an ASB event integration flow, returning it to the queue or subscription for redelivery. Event Integration-only.

component.name: consumer_deadLetter
component.description: Dead-Letter the current message in an ASB event integration flow, moving it to the Dead-Letter Queue. Event Integration-only.

component.name: consumer_defer
component.description: Defer the current message in an ASB event integration flow. Deferred messages can only be received later by sequence number. Event Integration-only.
